completed: Mongoose Invalidation Hooks for core entities
Standardized Loading States in ProtectedRoute and Faculty Modules
pending: Enforce mandatory password change for first-time login

decisions.decision: Transitioned from manual cache management in controllers to automated Mongoose hooks and ETag-based browser revalidation.
decisions.trade_offs: Prioritized consistency and browser standards over aggressive local-only caching to ensure peak data accuracy.

decisions.decision: Implemented a full-screen branded PageSpinner with framer-motion animations, community credit (ARC Club), and grid textures.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds a dependency on framer-motion for animations but significantly improves perceived brand value.
